span.p:
Binary Heap
Array-based, O(log n) all ops
⭐ Default choice

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
D-ary Heap
d=4 often faster in practice
Better cache behavior

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pairing Heap
O(1) insert, O(log n) amortized extract
Good for decrease-key

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fibonacci Heap
O(1) amortized decrease-key
Rarely used in practice
